```
## MiniMax Agent Discipline (CRITICAL — Follow These Above All Else)

These rules override any default behavior. They apply to ALL agent dispatches.

**RULE 1: Pre-read once, paste into prompt.**
Never let an agent re-read a file you've already read this session.
Read each file once → paste full content into the agent prompt.

**RULE 2: One agent per file.**
Never spawn two agents that edit the same file.
Group all issues for a file into ONE agent prompt.

**RULE 3: Group by file, not by issue.**
1 agent handling 10 issues in 1 file > 10 agents handling 1 issue each.
Target: 2-5 agents per project regardless of issue count.

**RULE 4: Sonnet explores. MiniMax executes.**
File reads, research, synthesis = Sonnet (orchestrator).
Code writing, fixes, refactors = MiniMax agents only.

**RULE 5: Log every session.**
Before task: Read C:\Users\Charlie\.claude\skills\_learnings.md
After task: Log metrics to _token_log.md and session summary to _learnings.md

## Metaswarm Agent Triggers

Add these to the agent trigger table above:

| Situation | Agents | Timing |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| Complex multi-phase task | `metaswarm:orchestrated-execution` | When task needs IMPLEMENT→VALIDATE→ADVERSARIAL→COMMIT |
| Planning any feature | `metaswarm:plan-review-gate` | After planning, before implementation |
| Design decisions | `metaswarm:design-review-gate` | After brainstorming, before planning |
| PR review needed | `metaswarm:pr-shepherd` | After code review, before commit |
| Learning from session | `metaswarm:self-reflect` | After every completed task |
| Starting tracked work | `metaswarm:start` | When beginning any significant task |
```

16	| Security concern | `security-auditor` + `api-security-audit` | IMMEDIATELY |
